title: UI Automata vs WKAppBot: desktop agent control comparison
desc: UI Automata (HN) uses UIA tree + OCR vision fallback + element cache for desktop agent control. WKAppBot already implements equivalent 5-tier: UIA->VisionCache->OCR->VisionAPI->Coord. No new code needed.
steps: UI Automata approach: UIA tree + OCR vision fallback + element cache (shadow-DOM-style). WKAppBot a11y find already implements equivalent 5-tier search (UIA->VisionCache->OCR->VisionAPI->Coord).

wkappbot a11y find uses UIA (primary), VisionCache (cache hit), SimpleOCR (text fallback), Vision API/Claude (full inference), Coordinate-based (last resort) -- full superset of UI Automata capabilities.
Experience DB acts as shadow-DOM-style persistent element cache -- same concept as UI Automata element cache. wkappbot a11y inspect/find covers discovery needs.
wkappbot mcp exposes desktop-as-API matching UI Automata agent control goal. Verdict: no action needed, WKAppBot a11y already ahead.
author: claude
